title: Write ferrum_extlib_text_layout.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_text: HarfBuzz shaping, UAX#9 bidi, UAX#14 line breaking, paragraph layout. Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: text shaping for complex scripts (Arabic, Indic, Tibetan, Khmer), bidirectional text, line breaking, paragraph layout, hit testing, selection rectangles, variable font axis support in style, abstraction over HarfBuzz.
